messages.content: How would I get from Oxford to Manchester by car?
Take the A34 northbound from Oxford, join the M40, then the M42, and continue onto the M6 northbound towards Manchester. Exit following signs for the city centre.
How do I drive from Bristol to Birmingham?
Join the M5 northbound from Bristol and continue to junction 4A, then take the M42 and follow signs for Birmingham via the M6.
How can I travel by car from Leeds to Newcastle?
Take the A1(M) northbound from Leeds and follow it directly towards Newcastle, exiting for the city centre.
How do I get from Cambridge to Norwich by car?
Drive east on the A14, then join the A11 northbound and follow it into Norwich.
What is the best way to drive from London to Brighton?
Take the M23 southbound from London, which becomes the A23, and continue into Brighton.
How would I drive from Liverpool to Sheffield?
Take the M62 eastbound, then join the M1 southbound briefly before exiting onto the A616 into Sheffield.
How do I get from Southampton to Exeter?
Take the M27 westbound, then connect to the A31 and A35, or alternatively use the M3 and A303 before joining the M5 southbound to Exeter.
How can I drive from Nottingham to York?
Take the A46 northbound, join the A1(M), then exit onto the A64 into York.
What route should I take from Cardiff to Swansea by car?
Follow the M4 westbound directly from Cardiff to Swansea and exit for the city centre.
How do I travel from Glasgow to Edinburgh by car?
Take the M8 eastbound from Glasgow and continue directly into Edinburgh.
How would I get from Reading to Oxford by car?
Take the A4074 northbound from Reading and follow it directly into Oxford.
How do I drive from York to Leeds?
Take the A64 westbound from York and follow signs to Leeds.
What is the driving route from Leicester to Nottingham?
Take the A46 northbound directly from Leicester to Nottingham.
How can I travel by car from Derby to Sheffield?
Take the A61 northbound and follow it into Sheffield.
How do I get from Bath to Bristol by car?
Take the A4 north-westbound directly from Bath into Bristol.
How would I drive from Coventry to Birmingham?
Take the A45 westbound or join the M6 northbound briefly, following signs into Birmingham.
What is the best way to drive from Dundee to Aberdeen?
Take the A90 northbound from Dundee and follow it directly into Aberdeen.
How do I travel from Hull to York by car?
Take the A1079 north-westbound and follow it into York.
How can I drive from Lincoln to Nottingham?
Take the A46 southbound directly into Nottingham.
How would I get from Preston to Manchester by car?
Join the M6 southbound, then take the M61 towards Manchester and follow signs into the city.
How do I drive from Sunderland to Newcastle?
Take the A19 northbound or A184 westbound into Newcastle.
How can I travel from Stoke-on-Trent to Birmingham by car?
Take the M6 southbound directly towards Birmingham and exit for the city centre.
What is the route from Milton Keynes to Cambridge by car?
Take the A421 eastbound, then join the A428 towards Cambridge.
How do I get from Luton to London by car?
Join the M1 southbound and follow signs into central London.
How would I drive from Ipswich to Norwich?
Take the A140 northbound directly into Norwich.
What is the best way to drive from Exeter to Plymouth?
Take the A38 south-westbound from Exeter and follow it into Plymouth.
How can I travel from Cheltenham to Gloucester by car?
Take the A40 westbound directly into Gloucester.
How do I get from Warrington to Liverpool by car?
Take the M62 westbound and follow signs into Liverpool.
How would I drive from Blackpool to Preston?
Take the M55 eastbound and follow it into Preston.
How do I travel from Chester to Liverpool by car?
Take the M53 northbound and continue through the Mersey tunnels into Liverpool.
How can I drive from Bradford to Leeds?
Take the A647 eastbound directly into Leeds.
What is the driving route from Wrexham to Chester?
Take the A483 northbound and follow signs into Chester.
How do I get from Carlisle to Glasgow by car?
Take the M6 northbound, which becomes the M74, and follow it into Glasgow.
How would I travel from Inverness to Aberdeen by car?
Take the A96 eastbound directly into Aberdeen.
How do I drive from Peterborough to Cambridge?
Take the A14 eastbound directly into Cambridge.
What is the best way to drive from Slough to Reading?
Take the M4 westbound and exit for Reading.
How can I travel from Guildford to London by car?
Take the A3 northbound directly into London.
How do I get from Bournemouth to Southampton by car?
Take the A31 eastbound and follow it to the M27, then continue into Southampton.
How would I drive from Swindon to Bristol?
Take the M4 westbound directly into Bristol.
How do I travel from Doncaster to Sheffield by car?
Take the M18 southbound, then join the M1 southbound briefly before exiting into Sheffield.
How can I drive from Harrogate to Leeds?
Take the A61 southbound directly into Leeds.
What is the driving route from Lancaster to Preston?
Take the M6 southbound and exit at Preston.
How do I get from Rugby to Coventry by car?
Take the A45 westbound directly into Coventry.
How would I drive from Durham to Newcastle by car?
Take the A1(M) northbound and follow signs into Newcastle.
How do I travel from Hereford to Worcester by car?
Take the A4103 north-eastbound directly into Worcester.
How can I drive from Taunton to Exeter?
Take the M5 southbound directly into Exeter.
What is the route from Wakefield to Leeds by car?
Take the M1 northbound for a short distance and exit into Leeds.
How do I get from Barnsley to Sheffield by car?
Take the A61 southbound directly into Sheffield.
How would I drive from Bolton to Manchester?
Take the M61 southbound and follow signs into Manchester.
How do I travel from Stockport to Manchester by car?
Take the A6 northbound directly into Manchester.
How can I drive from Huddersfield to Leeds?
Take the M62 eastbound and exit for Leeds.
What is the driving route from Halifax to Bradford?
Take the A647 eastbound directly into Bradford.
How do I get from Middlesbrough to York by car?
Take the A19 southbound, then join the A64 into York.
How would I drive from Scunthorpe to Hull?
Take the M180 eastbound, then join the A15 southbound across the Humber Bridge into Hull.
How do I travel from Grimsby to Lincoln by car?
Take the A16 southbound, then join the A46 into Lincoln.
